name: playwright-mobile-lib
description: Cross-platform Playwright mobile fixture (iOS Safari + Android Chrome): connection, capabilities, appium input mode, unsupported-API guards, Zebrunner reporting.

scripts.test: node -e "require('./index.js'); console.log('playwright-mobile-lib loads ok')" && node test/screenshot-gate.test.js && node --test test/telemetry.test.js test/reporting.test.js
